status_info: For current flight status, gate assignments, and delays, please check the SkyCarrier mobile app or our website status page (skycarrier.example/status). Flight status can change up to 30 minutes before departure; the live system is authoritative. Our support agents do not have access to a separate status feed — they use the same sources you can access directly. If you cannot reach the app or website, call +1-555-SKY-HELP.
